$comment: Alfred -> Cursor/Claude/Codex MCP catalog. Template only: ${env:VAR} placeholders are resolved from Alfred's .env (or machine env) by Provision-Cursor.ps1. Path tokens (${repoRoot}, ${financeDir}, etc.) are resolved at provision time. Keys starting with _ are metadata and are stripped before write. NEVER put real tokens here. Each server has a '_bucket'; only selected buckets install. Work default: core,powerbi,data. Choose with Provision-Cursor.ps1 -Buckets "core,powerbi,data" (or 'all'), or ALFRED_BUCKETS=... in .env. The 'core' bucket is always installed. Packages are resolved from upstream at install/update time (npx -y, uvx, docker) — Alfred does not vendor MCP binaries as source of truth.

powerbi-modeling-mcp._note: Edit live Power BI Desktop models. Auto-skipped if VS Code Power BI Modeling MCP extension is not installed.

excel._note: Read/write live OPEN Excel workbooks only. Do NOT use with excel-mcp (opposite access model). Auto-skipped if Alfred venv python or excellm is missing.

excel-mcp._note: ExcelMcp — CLOSED workbook / exclusive COM only. Complements live 'excel' (excellm). Never alternate mid-task. Auto-skipped if exe missing. Fetched from upstream release on setup/update.

github._note: Official GitHub MCP (ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server). Falls back to npx @latest when Docker is not installed. Token from GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN in Alfred .env.

playwright._note: Browser automation - navigate, fill forms, screenshot, reproduce UI bugs. No key needed.

context7._note: Library/SDK docs only — prefer over fetch for API syntax. Do NOT use for repo code or general web search.

markitdown._note: Local file URI conversion (PDF, Office, images). Do NOT use for library docs (context7) or live search.

fetch._note: Single known URL → markdown. Do NOT use for library docs (context7) or news/latest.

filesystem._note: Finance OneDrive folder ONLY — use native Read/Grep for repo code. Never double-read the same file.

duckdb._note: SQL on CSV, Parquet, Excel exports, and local analytics DB.

fal-ai._note: AI image/video/audio generation via fal.ai. Auto-skipped unless FAL_KEY is set in Alfred .env.

magic._note: Magic UI components — animated React/Tailwind UI blocks. No key required.

parallel-search._note: LLM-optimized web search + fetch. Opt-in via web bucket (not in work default) to keep always-on tool context small. For higher rate limits set PARALLEL_API_KEY.

firecrawl._note: Web scraping/crawling. Auto-skipped unless FIRECRAWL_API_KEY is set. Get one at https://www.firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys

longhand._note: Lossless Claude Code session history. Install: pip install -U longhand && longhand setup. Auto-skipped if not on PATH.

supabase._note: Supabase MCP — SaaS/webdev only (not work). OAuth on first use. Also: npx skills add supabase/agent-skills. Auto-skipped unless SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF is set. Never put secrets in git.

vercel._note: Vercel MCP — SaaS/webdev only (not work). OAuth on first use. Also: npx plugins add vercel/vercel-plugin.

_buckets.core: Always installed — GitHub, library docs (context7), finance-scoped filesystem.
_buckets.powerbi: Power BI semantic-model editing + Fabric skills (incl. report/visual design skills). No design MCPs.
_buckets.data: Analyst data stack — DuckDB, markitdown, live Excel (excellm), closed Excel (ExcelMcp), optional longhand.
_buckets.web: Browsing/search/scraping — parallel-search, Playwright, Firecrawl, fetch. Not in work default.
_buckets.mediagen: Image/video/audio + Magic UI generation MCPs (fal.ai, magic). SaaS/personal only — not work.
_buckets.webdev: SaaS / web-app backends — Supabase, Vercel. Never on work installs.
